title: Why You're Still Better Than AI at Editing Documents - CS50 Tech Talk
summary: The talk argues that humans remain superior to AI at reliably editing documents like .docx files because AI struggles with document structure and the implicit logic that holds meaning across pages. The speaker contends that treating documents as software rather than text files is necessary for AI to scale document operations reliably.
